excluded_dependencies_reason: Confirmed by direct testing (import + sample sunrise/vaara/paksha/nakshatra calculations) that jhora.panchanga.drik and jhora.panchanga.pancha_paksha produce identical results with and without PyQt6/pyqtgraph installed. Neither is imported by this call chain (jhora, jhora.config, jhora.const, jhora.utils, jhora.panchanga.drik, jhora.panchanga.pancha_paksha) at module load time. Both are excluded from the production runtime.
